body:
## Summary

Fixes #8.

- Fix the Electron release failure by removing the unsupported top-level `build.tar` electron-builder config and moving tar.gz naming to `build.linux.artifactName`.
- Keep the signed/notarized macOS artifact policy, but skip macOS artifacts with a warning when signing/notarization secrets are absent so Linux and Windows releases can still publish.
- Add `browser-commander` + Playwright checks for the GitHub Pages download site before deploy and after the published Pages URL is available.
- Preserve the issue investigation, failed CI log, GitHub metadata, release state, and template comparison under `docs/case-studies/issue-8/`.
- Refresh `package-lock.json` so `npm ci` works with electron-builder's Windows packaging peer tree.

## Root Cause

The failed `Electron release` run `25625660967` had two independent blockers:

- Linux and Windows failed electron-builder config validation with `configuration has an unknown property 'tar'`.
- macOS failed because `MAC_CSC_LINK`, `MAC_CSC_KEY_PASSWORD`, `APPLE_API_KEY`, `APPLE_API_KEY_ID`, and `APPLE_API_ISSUER` were not configured.

The previous macOS secret check failed the matrix job, which prevented the otherwise publishable non-macOS artifacts from reaching the release.

## Verification

- `npm ci`
- `npm run check` (passes; existing `src/bot/runner.js` complexity warning remains)
- `npm test`
- `npm run build:renderer`
- `npm run build:site`
- `npx electron-builder --linux dir --publish never`
- `PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_BROWSER_DOWNLOAD=1 npm install --no-save --package-lock=false --no-audit --no-fund browser-commander@0.8.0 playwright@1.59.1`
- `npx playwright install chromium`
- `npm run test:pages:e2e -- --site-dir site/dist`
- `bash scripts/check-mjs-syntax.sh`
- `bash scripts/check-file-line-limits.sh`
- `npx --yes -p secretlint -p @secretlint/secretlint-rule-preset-recommend secretlint "**/*"`
- `node scripts/validate-changeset.mjs`

No UI screenshot is attached because this change adds release workflow and browser validation coverage rather than changing the visual design.
title: Fix Electron release publishing and Pages e2e checks
